name_en: New Arrival M14231 [Lx TM Pochette Métis East West Handbag] M14231 Cherry. This Pochette Métis East West handbag is from the x Murakami Re-Imagined series, dyeing the Monogram coated canvas in soft new-season tones that complement the sweet cherry pattern in the artist's work. The glossy S-lock buckle lights up the overall design, and the exquisite structure features multiple compartments, making it an elegant choice for daily travel. Detailed Features - 13.5 x 6 x 21.5 cm
